channel.title: treymer.dev
channel.description: Engineering, leadership, and life — by Tyler Reymer

item.title: From Clarinet Kid to Jazz Chaser: My Guitar Journey
item.description: How a pandemic, YouTube teachers, and a stubborn dream turned me from a lapsed clarinet player into a jazz-obsessed guitarist.

item.title: I Vibe Coded My Personal Site as an SRE Manager — Here's What I Learned
item.description: As an SRE manager I don't write much code anymore. So I built this entire site using AI-assisted development and learned more than I expected.

item.title: I Built My Own Guitar App Because I Was Tired of Ads
item.description: How I vibe coded Cadence — a chromatic tuner, key finder, metronome, and chord suggester for Android — as an SRE manager learning guitar, with zero ads and zero tracking.
